category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Madagascar.

title.en: China-to-Madagascar EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入马达加斯加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入馬達加斯加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Madagascar BNM / ORE / JIRAMA requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, ORE and JIRAMA grid-connection coordination requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Includes an honest assessment of Madagascar's nascent EV market context and grid reliability constraints.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与马达加斯加BNM / ORE / JIRAMA要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、ORE和JIRAMA并网协调要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。包含对马达加斯加新兴电动汽车市场现状与电网可靠性制约的客观评估。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與馬達加斯加BNM / ORE / JIRAMA要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、ORE和JIRAMA併網協調要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。包含對馬達加斯加新興電動汽車市場現狀與電網可靠性制約的客觀評估。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Madagascar, the confirmed practical gaps are: IEC-based safety evidence required under BNM-adopted IEC standards (IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23) and coordinated with ORE; connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), which is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; ORE regulatory approval and JIRAMA grid-connection coordination for any installation on Madagascar's national grid; EMC conformity to IEC 61000 series; and OCPP back-office protocol for any networked deployment. Madagascar operates on 220/380 V, 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage as China's domestic baseline — but grid reliability is severely constrained by JIRAMA's infrastructure, and voltage fluctuations, outages, and low rural electrification rates are significant deployment risks. Critically, Madagascar's EV market is extremely nascent: domestic EV penetration is near zero, and charging infrastructure deployment faces fundamental constraints from low electrification rates, fuel-import dependency, and limited grid capacity. Exporters must assess not only technical compliance but whether viable deployment conditions exist for the specific project and location. BNM conformity assessment and ORE/JIRAMA coordination are the regulatory gates before any installation.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入马达加斯加时，已确认的实务差距包括：BNM采纳的IEC标准（IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23）要求并经ORE协调的IEC体系安全证据；须将接口从GB/T 20234硬件重新设计为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），两者物理上不兼容；在马达加斯加国家电网上安装须取得ORE监管批准并与JIRAMA进行并网协调；EMC须符合IEC 61000系列；联网部署须支持OCPP后台协议。马达加斯加采用220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国国内基准电压相同，但JIRAMA的基础设施制约导致电网可靠性严重不足，电压波动、停电及农村电气化率低是重大部署风险。尤其重要的是，马达加斯加电动汽车市场极为初级：国内电动汽车保有量几乎为零，充电基础设施部署面临电气化率低、燃油进口依赖和电网容量不足等根本性制约。出口商不仅须评估技术合规性，还须评估特定项目和地点是否具备可行的部署条件。BNM合格评定和ORE/JIRAMA协调是任何安装前的监管门槛。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入馬達加斯加時，已確認的實務差距包括：BNM採納的IEC標準（IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23）要求並經ORE協調的IEC體系安全證據；須將接口從GB/T 20234硬體重新設計為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），兩者物理上不兼容；在馬達加斯加國家電網上安裝須取得ORE監管批准並與JIRAMA進行併網協調；EMC須符合IEC 61000系列；聯網部署須支持OCPP後台協議。馬達加斯加採用220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國國內基準電壓相同，但JIRAMA的基礎設施制約導致電網可靠性嚴重不足，電壓波動、停電及農村電氣化率低是重大部署風險。尤其重要的是，馬達加斯加電動汽車市場極為初級：國內電動汽車保有量幾乎為零，充電基礎設施部署面臨電氣化率低、燃油進口依賴和電網容量不足等根本性制約。出口商不僅須評估技術合規性，還須評估特定項目和地點是否具備可行的部署條件。BNM合格評定和ORE/JIRAMA協調是任何安裝前的監管門檻。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BNM scope determination, ORE approval, JIRAMA grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Madagascar conformity assessment rules, ORE and JIRAMA project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BNM适用范围裁定、ORE批准、JIRAMA并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行马达加斯加合格评定规则、ORE和JIRAMA项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BNM適用範圍裁定、ORE批准、JIRAMA併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬達加斯加合格評定規則、ORE和JIRAMA項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
